items.name: Emerald Boltstorm Blade
items.description: The Emerald Boltstorm Blade is a legendary weapon renowned for its breathtaking beauty and formidable power. Crafted from the finest emerald gemstones and enchanted with ancient magic, this sword possesses an otherworldly glow that shimmers with vibrant green hues. True to its name, the Emerald Boltstorm Blade possesses the extraordinary capability to summon lightning and channel it through the sword, unleashing devastating bolts of electrifying energy upon its foes. Each strike crackles with raw power, electrifying the air and leaving adversaries in awe of its sheer might.
